description: Close accountable human evidence, mapping, source-rights and dashboard review gates.

gates.evidence: Review pack and calibration calculations are generated; accountable adjudication remains pending.

The owner approved 178 checksum-bound rows across prior review packets. The current active source-rights queue contains 165 approved provider/source-derived candidates; 13 project-owned metadata descriptors are governed separately by Apache-2.0. CMS/MBS/PBS restrictions remain explicit.
The commit-bound automated packet covers 44 browser tests and 36 screenshot hashes; scoped accountable human review remains pending and automated evidence is not universal WCAG certification.
